serverInfo.title: Calypso Multimodal RAG MCP
serverInfo.description: Multimodal RAG for source-backed AI answers through the Calypso Responses API.

tools.name: calypso-rag-agent
tools.title: Calypso RAG Agent
tools.description: Query the Calypso RAG agent for grounded answers over the configured knowledge base. Use `/new` as the prompt to reset the current conversation and start a fresh thread.

prompt.description: Your request. Include context, constraints, and desired output.

fileIds.description: Optional indexed knowledge file ids to scope retrieval.

tools.name: calypso-list-knowledge-buckets
tools.title: Calypso List Knowledge Buckets
tools.description: List all knowledge buckets for the team tied to the configured Calypso API key. Use this before uploads to discover bucket ids, slugs, names, member counts, and bucket-store readiness.

includeArchived.description: If true, include archived buckets. Defaults to false.

tools.name: calypso-upload-knowledge-file
tools.title: Calypso Upload Knowledge File
tools.description: Upload one local or inline file into the durable bucket-backed knowledge store through an upload session. Choose exactly one file source: use filePath when this MCP server runs locally and can read the path, including Claude Desktop or Cursor configs that launch this package with npx; use contentBase64 for hosted or remote MCP clients, browser uploads, generated in-memory content, or remote sandbox files that this MCP process cannot read. BucketIds, bucketSlugs, or bucket is required.

filename.description: Display filename for the uploaded knowledge file.

mimeType.description: Content type for the uploaded knowledge file.

filePath.description: Preferred for local MCP installs, including Claude Desktop and Cursor configs that run this package with a local command such as npx. Absolute or relative path readable by the machine running this MCP server. The server reads raw bytes and uploads them through the Calypso upload-session URL; no user-side base64 conversion is needed.

contentBase64.description: Inline file bytes as base64. Use when filePath is not possible, such as hosted or remote MCP servers, browser-provided files, generated content, or remote sandbox attachment paths that the MCP process cannot read.

title.description: Optional human-readable title stored with the knowledge file.

metadata.description: Optional metadata object serialized with the upload.

bucketIds.description: Existing knowledge bucket ids to assign this upload to. Required unless bucketSlugs or bucket is provided.

bucketSlugs.description: Knowledge bucket slugs to assign this upload to. Required unless bucketIds or bucket is provided.

bucket.description: Convenience single bucket slug for this upload. Required unless bucketIds or bucketSlugs is provided.

createMissingBuckets.description: If true, create missing bucket slugs before assignment.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key for durable upload retries.

waitForIndexing.description: If true, wait until indexing reaches a terminal ready state before returning.

tools.name: calypso-upload-knowledge-files-batch
tools.title: Calypso Upload Knowledge Files Batch
tools.description: Upload 1 to 100 local or inline files into the durable knowledge store through batch upload sessions. Choose exactly one file source per item: use filePath when this MCP server runs locally and can read each path, including Claude Desktop or Cursor configs that launch this package with npx; use contentBase64 for hosted or remote MCP clients, browser uploads, generated in-memory content, or remote sandbox files that this MCP process cannot read. A shared bucket destination is required unless every item has its own bucket destination.

items.description: Knowledge files to upload in this batch.

filename.description: Display filename for this knowledge file.

mimeType.description: Content type for this knowledge file.

filePath.description: Preferred for local MCP installs, including Claude Desktop and Cursor configs that run this package with a local command such as npx. Absolute or relative path readable by the machine running this MCP server. The server reads raw bytes and uploads them through the Calypso upload-session URL; no user-side base64 conversion is needed.

contentBase64.description: Inline file bytes as base64. Use when filePath is not possible, such as hosted or remote MCP servers, browser-provided files, generated content, or remote sandbox attachment paths that the MCP process cannot read.

clientFileId.description: Optional Firestore-safe id for this batch item. Omit to generate one.

title.description: Optional human-readable title for this item.

metadata.description: Optional metadata object for this item.

bucketIds.description: Existing bucket ids for this item. Required when no shared bucket destination is provided.

bucketSlugs.description: Bucket slugs for this item. Required when no shared bucket destination is provided.

bucket.description: Convenience single bucket slug for this item. Required when no shared bucket destination is provided.

createMissingBuckets.description: If true, create missing bucket slugs for this item.

batchIdempotencyKey.description: Required idempotency key used to derive the durable batch id.

bucketIds.description: Existing bucket ids applied to all items by default. Required unless every item has a bucket destination.

bucketSlugs.description: Bucket slugs applied to all items by default. Required unless every item has a bucket destination.

bucket.description: Convenience single bucket slug applied to all items by default. Required unless every item has a bucket destination.

createMissingBuckets.description: If true, create missing shared bucket slugs before assignment.

waitForBatchReady.description: If true, poll batch status with include_items=true until terminal or timeout.
